scope.green_applies_to: verbatim FTC excerpt replay, if independently matched from public source

replay_vector.test_question: Can an independent replayer reach the same FTC excerpt from the public URL and match the preserved excerpt bytes?
steps: Open the public_url from the excerpt card.
Locate the quoted FTC source text without author guidance.
Copy the exact excerpt bytes using the same normalization rule declared by the card.
Compute SHA256 over the preserved excerpt block.
Compare computed SHA256 to the card sha256.
Confirm no ui_label, ui_feedback, or ui_red_card_message text appears inside excerpt.
pass_conditions: public_url resolves to an official FTC source or archived official FTC source
excerpt text matches the source text under declared normalization
ui fields are absent from evidence fields
summary is not used as replay source
fail_conditions: public_url unavailable without archive or alternate official source
excerpt is paraphrased or analytical rather than verbatim
Brenda or UI text appears in excerpt/public_url/source_owner/sha256/linked_nodes
card claims ISD 742 delivery without external receipt

dashboard_interpretation.brenda_ui_feedback: FTC excerpt replays clean in three clicks. District packet still in your outbox. No paint, just proof.

final_rule: Green only where the bytes prove themselves. Beige everywhere else.
